changeSet.author: pkomena
pkomena
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Grouping Mode' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), 'dictionary.bacteriology.grouping.' || lower(replace(entry, ' ', '_')), sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('Isolées', 1), ('Amas', 2), ('Courte chaînette', 3), ('Longue Chaînette', 4), ('Grappe', 5), ('Tétrade', 6), ('Diplo', 7) ) AS data(entry, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Gram Type' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), 'dictionary.bacteriology.gram.' || lower(replace(replace(entry, ' ', '_'), 'é', 'e')), sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('Bacilles Gram négatif', 1), ('Bacilles Gram positif', 2), ('Cocci Gram négatif', 3), ('Cocci Gram positif', 4), ('Coccobacilles Gram négatif', 5), ('Coccobacilles Gram positif', 6) ) AS data(entry, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Culture Result' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), 'dictionary.bacteriology.culture.' || lower(replace(replace(entry, ' ', '_'), 'é', 'e')), sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('Négative', 1), ('Positive', 2), ('Contaminée', 3) ) AS data(entry, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Add some common bacteria to dictionary
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteria' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), 'dictionary.bacteria.' || lower(replace(replace(replace(entry, ' ', '_'), '.', ''), '(', '')), sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('Escherichia coli', 1), ('Staphylococcus aureus', 2), ('Streptococcus pneumoniae', 3), ('Klebsiella pneumoniae', 4), ('Pseudomonas aeruginosa', 5), ('Enterococcus faecalis', 6), ('Candida albicans', 7), ('Neisseria gonorrhoeae', 8), ('Proteus mirabilis', 9), ('Salmonella spp.', 10), ('Shigella spp.', 11), ('Haemophilus influenzae', 12), ('Streptococcus agalactiae', 13), ('Enterobacter spp.', 14), ('Acinetobacter baumannii', 15) ) AS data(entry, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );
